prompt_used: This is Locksmith Omar Hale. I should not be leaving this message. Something about voicemail waveform anomaly is wrong, and The Quartermaster wants us to panic before anyone checks the chain of custody. Document how the lock was spoofed Please move quietly when you come to gallowglass 24-hour storage facility and storm-drain service tunnels.
source_prompt: Story: Midnight Lockbox (midnight-lockbox) | Hook: A self-storage unit with no renter sends voice memos predicting what your team will do next. | Subgenre: supernatural mystery | Tone: GROUNDED | Location: Gallowglass 24-hour storage facility and storm-drain service tunnels | Villain: The Quartermaster | Villain worldview: Storage is memory, and memory belongs to whoever controls access. | Motifs: unit tags, bolt cutters, time-lock stickers. Build unique voice profile for Locksmith Omar Hale. Baseline emotion=CALM. Motivations=Document how the lock was spoofed. Include cadence notes and emotional shifts for suspicion, trust, and panic states.
